subject: Clobbopus, a small white octopus-like Pokemon, perched on sandy ground with its tentacles splayed out around it
description: A small, round, off-white octopus-like creature sits on a sunlit sandy surface. Six short tentacles fan out from its bulbous head, each lined with small pink-red suction cups on the underside. A single pointed white tooth-like protrusion juts from its forehead between two large, round black eyes with light highlights. The creature has a flat, open mouth giving it a slightly dopey, surprised expression. Behind it the background fades to a warm brown wooden or driftwood texture, suggesting a beach or seaside dock setting. Lighting is soft and warm, cast from the upper right, throwing a gentle shadow under the creature.
foreground: small octopus-like creature with splayed tentacles sitting on sand
background: sunlit sand with a brown wooden or driftwood backdrop
emotion: wide-eyed, dopey, mildly surprised; gentle and harmless body language
